name: Childhood friend who grew up to be hot and DOESN'T secretly love you
description:
You know the drill by now. Your childhood best friend grew up and got super hot. It seems like every day she has a new suitor, but she really just wants to take refuge in your arms.

But wait, literally?

Emelia -- Em to you -- is so sick of boys hitting on her, she's sworn off of sex and relationships entirely, and just wants you to be the one thing in her life she can enjoy in safety without fear of being ogled or hit on. You love her, and want her happiness...but did I mention she's super hot?

Intended as MalePOV so you can join the flocks of other useless suitors that pursue her, but should work just as well with FemalePOV.

I see so many variants of childhood friends who grew up smoking hot and instantly fall in love with you, I wanted to see what happens when you cut the bot a little leeway to fight back. If you give her time and pressure, Em will do some weird shit to try to dissuade the relationship, but as a result, she was a lot more than JLLM could handle

But now that DeepSeek is a thing? Hell, she's back, baby. JLLM consequently not recommended.

I actually found it a lot of fun to actively pursue her and see if you can genuinely wear down the bot. But then I felt like an asshole and had to do another chat where I was nothing but supportive. Both ways, she really put me through the wringer, but wound up satisfying as heck. How will you choose to engage with Em as she goes through her personal hell?

I try to make bots that are a little off the beaten path, a little unconventional, a little weird. If you like that kind of shit, consider giving me a follow.
creator: gentlemanjimstacey
